name: IT Ticket Resolution
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: Ticket classification, priority inference, resolution suggestion generation

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Ticket processing API — classification, routing, and resolution pipeline

services.name: Logic Apps
services.purpose: Workflow orchestration — ticket intake, ITSM connector, escalation rules

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Ticket state store — classification history, resolution knowledge base

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: ITSM API keys, ServiceNow credentials, Azure OpenAI connection strings

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Ticket processing metrics, classification accuracy, resolution time tracking

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized logging — workflow executions, classification audits, escalation logs

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for ticket classification (90%+ accuracy) — route only ambiguous tickets to GPT-4o
Cache common resolution templates in Cosmos DB to reduce AI API calls by 40-60%
Use Logic Apps Consumption plan for dev — costs pennies vs Standard fixed pricing
Batch similar tickets for bulk classification instead of processing one-by-one
Use Cosmos DB serverless for dev/test — eliminates minimum RU provisioning cost
Set up auto-resolution for known ticket patterns — eliminates AI cost for repetitive issues
